title: Strictest 4-quadrant authority layer; "Durable Workspace Core"
public_claim: Strictest 4-quadrant authority layer; "Durable Workspace Core" is a preserved project packet for this is the smallest and most explicitly anti-ambiguity package in the 2026-04-14 cohort.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
